_comment: Sample config snippet — merge the 'mcpServers' block into your own claude_desktop_config.json.
- The entry below uses STDIO transport: Claude Desktop spawns 'docker exec -i ...'
and communicates over stdin/stdout. The container must already be running.
- Alternatively, configure SSE transport by pointing Claude Desktop at
http://localhost:8001/sse once the container exposes that endpoint.
